2978746.title: Breadwinners
2978746.description: After wracking up a huge bill at Pumpers, SwaySway and Buhdeuce level up into Diner Ducks to pay off their debt. // Things get awkward when the guys eat a loaf of Switcheroo Bread and swap bodies.

2978813.title: Breadwinners
2978813.description: SwaySway and Buhdeuce become obsessed with winning a toy out of the new crane game that's been installed at Pumpers. / When Buhdeuce gets a bad haircut, he goes berserks, and now SwaySway has to calm his buddy down before he gets busted by Rambamboo.

2983945.title: Breadwinners
2983945.description: After wracking up a huge bill at Pumpers, SwaySway and Buhdeuce level up into Diner Ducks to pay off their debt. // Things get awkward when the guys eat a loaf of Switcheroo Bread and swap bodies.

2989553.title: Breadwinners
2989553.description: SwaySway and Buhdeuce head deep into the bread mines to introduce their number one customer to the Bread Maker! // After breaking each other's favorite possessions, they get into a feud and might just part ways FOREVER!

2989625.title: Breadwinners
2989625.description: Strap on your helmets and hold on to your tail feathers because SwaySway and Buhdeuce are delivering bread in space! // When Ketta crashes at the Swamp Pad, her home modifications drive the guys whoa-ma-gosh quazy.

3003841.title: Breadwinners
3003841.description: SwaySway and Buhdeuce become obsessed with winning a toy out of the new crane game that's been installed at Pumpers. / When Buhdeuce gets a bad haircut, he goes berserks, and now SwaySway has to calm his buddy down before he gets busted by Rambamboo.

3019703.title: Breadwinners
3019703.description: When SwaySway and Buhdeuce are trapped in a cave of stale bread by a ferocious Tunnel Eater, the guys pass the time by reminiscing about how they first met and became best baps for life.

3041380.title: Breadwinners
3041380.description: SwaySway and Buhdeuce meet their match when two punker cranes start delivering pizza on their turf. // Buhdeuce has a bad day, so he eats Yeasterday Bread, reliving the same day over and over with bad results for SwaySway.

3012286.title: Breadwinners
3012286.description: When Pumpers holds a talent show, SwaySway must overcome his stage fright to perform a love song for Jenny Quackles. // SwaySway and Buhdeuce convince the Bread Maker to lose a wrestling match to Lava Mole.

3021436.title: Breadwinners
3021436.description: Buhdeuce is lured away from Breadwinning by the glitz and glamour of being a movie star. // When Mrs. Furfle falls into a deep magical sleep, SwaySway and Buhdeuce pretend she's awake so she won't miss her big date with T-Midi.

3038104.title: Breadwinners
3038104.description: Buckle up, duckies! The rocket van is about to get some sweet mods from ace-mechanic Ketta. // Mold strikes the bread mines, and the only ones who can strike back are TRUE Breadwinners.

3038156.title: Breadwinners
3038156.description: When the guys get stranded in the middle of the Great Pond, they're forced to level up into "Survivor Ducks." // SwaySway and Buhdeuce show off their "bread-side" manner by nursing their number one customer back to health.

3041024.title: Breadwinners
3041024.description: SwaySway and Buhdeuce head deep into the bread mines to introduce their number one customer to the Bread Maker! // After breaking each other's favorite possessions, they get into a feud and might just part ways FOREVER!

2997785.title: Breadwinners
2997785.description: SwaySway and Buhdeuce sneak into a "girls only" summer camp in order to find the one and only Jenny Quackles. // The guys head to the beach and nothing is gonna ruin their day, not even a big scary M-M-M-M-MONSTER

2997837.title: Breadwinners
2997837.description: After wracking up a ton of tickets from Chief Rambamboo, SwaySway and Buhdeuce get sent to traffic school. // They discover an underground Food Fight Club, and they're gonna have to food fight to save their beaks!

3002448.title: Breadwinners
3002448.description: Strap on your helmets and hold on to your tail feathers because SwaySway and Buhdeuce are delivering bread in space! // When Ketta crashes at the Swamp Pad, her home modifications drive the guys whoa-ma-gosh quazy.
